title: leadable fences
description: a simple data pack that lets you lead fences together
body:
This is a datapack that adds the ability to connect fences with leads.
To use the datapack drop a lead item on a fence and it will become leadable.
after thar you can lead it and connect it to other fences.
To destroy it you rightclick on the top part of the lead on the fence.

This is a prevue of how it looks:


![visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4a36398388f2b247e11d7ba34a5d49d00d0c57_0.webp)
